user_input: Can you also make it possible for us to move the 3D map around, so we can manually navigate to different places, zoom, etc?

content:
Adding manual 3D navigation to the LightGBM map. Inspecting how the camera and controls are currently set up.
Implementing spherical orbit controls (matching the fleet-flow viz pattern), pausing auto-orbit while the user navigates, and syncing the React export.
Implementing spherical orbit controls (matching the fleet-flow viz pattern), pausing auto-orbit while the user navigates, and syncing the React export.
Syncing the React export from the canonical file.
Syncing the React export from the canonical file.
Added manual 3D navigation to `lightgbm-emissions-art-v2.html` and synced the React export.

### Controls
| Input | Action |
|--------|--------|
| **Drag** (left click / one finger) | Orbit — rotate around the map |
| **Scroll** / **pinch** | Zoom in/out |
| **Shift+drag** or **right-drag** | Pan — move focus across the US |
| **Two fingers** (mobile) | Pinch to zoom + pan |

A hint pill above the bottom controls shows these shortcuts (mobile gets shorter copy).

### Auto-orbit behavior
The slow auto-orbit still runs when **Auto camera orbit** is on, but it **pauses while you're navigating** and resumes **8 seconds after you stop** — so manual control and the demo orbit don't fight each other.

### Reset
**Tweaks → Reset map view** snaps back to the default framing (north up, Florida bottom-right).

Refresh the preview and drag on the map canvas (not the control panels). You should be able to orbit to any region, zoom into a state, and pan across the country. If you want orbit disabled by default so it's fully manual, I can flip that.Added manual 3D navigation to `lightgbm-emissions-art-v2.html` and synced the React export.

### Controls
| Input | Action |
|--------|--------|
| **Drag** (left click / one finger) | Orbit — rotate around the map |
| **Scroll** / **pinch** | Zoom in/out |
| **Shift+drag** or **right-drag** | Pan — move focus across the US |
| **Two fingers** (mobile) | Pinch to zoom + pan |

A hint pill above the bottom controls shows these shortcuts (mobile gets shorter copy).

### Auto-orbit behavior
The slow auto-orbit still runs when **Auto camera orbit** is on, but it **pauses while you're navigating** and resumes **8 seconds after you stop** — so manual control and the demo orbit don't fight each other.

### Reset
**Tweaks → Reset map view** snaps back to the default framing (north up, Florida bottom-right).

Refresh the preview and drag on the map canvas (not the control panels). You should be able to orbit to any region, zoom into a state, and pan across the country. If you want orbit disabled by default so it's fully manual, I can flip that.
